channel.title: Punto De Lectura on Mi biblioteca
channel.description: Recent content in Punto De Lectura on Mi biblioteca

item.title: Mamá
item.description: Nikki Eaton, single, thirty-one, sexually liberated, and economically self-supporting, has never particularly thought of herself as a daughter. Yet, following the unexpected loss of her mother, she undergoes a remarkable transformation during a tumultuous year that brings stunning horror, sorrow, illumination, wisdom, and even—from an unexpected source—a nurturing love.
